lock_of_the_week: Nine Spoons One Brûlée (-650) over PO' BOYD SANDWICH — Mais sha, dis da Lock of da week, save ya money for a fresh crawfish boil, that's true. Spoons da #1 seed AND da #1 power team now, leadin' da whole league in quality starts, ERA, WHIP, AND K/BB — four pitchin' cats, I gar-on-tee. PO' BOYD just laid a rotten egg in Week 14 (.193, 20 runs, 4 homers) and dey season basically cooked at 10th in da standings. Da model say Spoons take twelve of fourteen cats. Pick: Spoons by way of a étouffée dat feed da whole bayou, dat's true.

matchups.blurb: OOO WEE, da marquee of da week — da #2 seed against da #3 seed, two teams already punched into da playoffs, that's true. Dis one about seedin' and pride, sha. Exxon Valdez da slight favorite even against da almighty CLAUDE, on da strength of leadin' da league in RBI, OBP, AND saves-plus-holds, plus dat 2.05 ERA dey threw in Week 14. CLAUDE gon' grab steals, wins, and strikeouts — dey lead all three — but da bats been nappin' (.251 last week), and dat let Valdez sneak da close cats. Da model say Valdez 7-5-2. Pick: Exxon Valdez by way of a Galatoire's lunch, dat's true.

WOOOO DOGGY, dis da LOCK OF DA WEEK, so keep ya wallet in ya pocket, cher. Spoons rollin' as da #1 seed wit' da best pitchin' staff in da CFBL — quality starts, ERA, WHIP, K/BB, dey lead 'em all, I gar-on-tee. PO' BOYD still got pop (1st in slugging, 2nd in homers), so dey might steal homers and slugging, dat's true, but everything dat involve a pitcher's mound belong to Spoons. After dat .193 disaster in Week 14, PO' BOYD season is done at 10th. Pick: Spoons twelve cats to two, by way of a Sunday gumbo wit' file AND okra, dat's true.

Mais sha, da #4 seed against a Balls team dat's basically playin' out da string, that's true. Caminero leads da league in home runs (155!) and ranks 2nd in RBI AND strikeouts — dat's a lotta thump, cher. Balls got dey one trick (2nd in quality starts) and dey gon' grab QS and maybe a rate cat, but dey dead-last in saves-plus-holds and 11th in steals, so dey punt two cats before da week even start. Caminero take da power and da volume. Pick: Caminero by way of a muffuletta wit' extra olive salad, dat's true.

team_a.name: Camp of the New Orleans Saints

matchups.blurb: Cher, dis a MUST-WIN for Camp, that's true — dey on da playoff bubble at 22%, and dey cannot be droppin' cats to da 12th-place team. Camp comin' in hot (13 homers, 44 RBI in Week 14) and dey rank 4th in RBI and strikeouts. Polar is da league cellar — last in runs, RBI, steals, AND ERA — wit' only some saves and leftover power to lean on (dey did pop 11 saves-plus-holds last week, sha). Camp need a fat week here to chase down ShawSwank, and dis da kind of matchup where you stack it up. Pick: Camp by way of a crawfish boil wit' all da fixin's, dat's true.

Mais oui, da bubble desperado against da team dat already banked its ticket, that's true. Y&Y is da hottest team NOT in da playoff field — dey lead da league in average and been mashin' (.291/.380/.520 in Week 14) — but dey 7th in da standings at just 10% odds, so dey need every cat dey can grab, sha. Trouble is Burns is a bad matchup: Burns LEADS da league in runs and ranks 2nd in OBP AND average, so dey gon' fight Y&Y for da very hittin' cats Y&Y need to win. Both teams thin on pitchin', so it come down to da bats, and Burns got da edge by a hair. Pick: Burns 7-6-1, by way of a po'boy dressed all da way, dat's true — but dis one a coin flip, cher.

WOOO, ShawSwank protectin' dey playoff life here, that's true — dey holdin' da last spot, da #6 seed, at 67% odds, and dey need to keep stackin' wins. Good news for ShawSwank: Duran is a soft landin'. ShawSwank ranks 2nd in wins AND saves-plus-holds and 3rd in quality starts, while Duran can't hit a lick — dead-last in homers, OBP, AND slugging. Duran gon' grab steals (dey 2nd) and maybe a win or two from all dem closers, but da rest belong to ShawSwank. Dis da kind of week da #6 seed gotta bank. Pick: ShawSwank by way of a shrimp remoulade, dat's true.
